coreIssue: Sarah, as a UX Lead, is keen on advancing to a Head of UX position, making it essential to map out her growth path. This meeting focuses on identifying required skill enhancements, particularly in delegation and stakeholder engagement, which are crucial for her leadership development. Addressing her ability to make strategic impacts in her current role will also be pivotal. Ensuring she understands these areas will help her prepare for future responsibilities in a Head role.
openingQuestion: Sarah, what specific skills or experiences do you feel you need to develop to be ready for a Head of UX role?
listenFor: whether she identifies specific skills she lacks
if they express confidence in current delegation abilities
whether she has strategies for engaging with stakeholders
avoid: do not assume she knows all the steps to take
do not focus solely on current role achievements
goodOutcome: You and Sarah will have a clear understanding of the skills and experiences she needs to develop for the Head of UX role.
suggestedAction: Identify one immediate opportunity for Sarah to practice delegation with her team this month.
